name: Cheddar-Potato-Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen broccoli cuts, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a 2- to 3-quart saucepan.
2. Add the onion and sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Add the potatoes, water, and bouillon cubes. Cover and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat to medium and cook until the potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes.
5. Remove 1 cup of potato cubes with a slotted spoon and set aside.
6. Pour the contents into a blender and process until smooth.
7. Return to the saucepan. Mix in the reserved potatoes and broccoli.
8. Place over medium-low heat. Gradually add the cheese, stirring until heated through and melted.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
Makes 4 servings.
